pageContext.name: Better Without You
pageContext.description: 'Don't worry your pretty little head about the future, it's all fine......'  Sideshow and Incendium LLC are proud to present the Better Without You Fine Art Lithograph Print!  This limited edition flocked lithograph employs a variety of custom printing techniques including a flocking texture inspired by 70's blacklight posters and printed on a pearlescent stock.  This officially licensed Evanescence art print celebrates the forthcoming 'Better Without You' from their latest album The Bitter Truth which has been adapted into one of the stories from the Comic Anthology 'Echoes from the Void', and incorporates iconography and symbolism drawn from the single. A glimpse of things to come...  Music fans and Art lovers, be sure to add this dreamy print to your Evanescence gallery today!
